name: Monstera Deliciosa
description: The Swiss Cheese Plant, known for its iconic split leaves. Native to Central American rainforests.

name: Echeveria
description: A rosette-forming succulent with fleshy, waxy leaves. Low maintenance and drought tolerant.

name: Boston Fern
description: A lush, feathery fern with arching fronds. Loves humidity and indirect light.

name: Rubber Plant
description: Ficus elastica, a hardy houseplant with thick, glossy dark green leaves. Easy to care for and great for purifying air.
